items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Launches Strikes on Iran to Retaliate for Downed Helicopter
items.summary: The president said earlier Iranian forces had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz and the United States “must, of necessity, respond to this attack.”
